# test(dataflow): Phase 8.1c — remove mocks from 7 Tier 2 tests (pool/migration/cache/query)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `15719c861784` — test(dataflow): Phase 8.1c — remove mocks from 7 Tier 2 tests (pool/migration/cache/query)

**Body**:

Replace unittest.mock usage with real infrastructure in:

- test_pool_prevention_integration.py — patch.dict(os.environ,...)
  replaced with in-file env_override contextmanager that mutates
  os.environ directly and restores on exit.
- test_bug_006_validation.py — Mock() passed to AutoMigrationSystem
  replaced with the real test_suite.config.url. The test only touches
  the in-memory applied_migrations list, so a real connection string
  is sufficient.
- test_bulk_parameter_mapping_integration.py — MagicMock() DataFlow
  replaced with a real DataFlow instance backed by shared test
  PostgreSQL (port 5434) via an autouse fixture.
- test_migration_trigger_system.py — @patch on
  DataFlow._initialize_database removed; tests now use the real
  test_suite PostgreSQL.
- test_circuit_breaker_integration.py — MagicMock performance monitor
  replaced with a real RecordingPerformanceMonitor class that records
  record_metric calls.
- test_dataflow_query_integration.py — @patch('dataflow.core.engine.
  QueryCache') replaced with an InMemoryQueryCache stand-in injected
  into the DataFlow instance; the cache now stores real state and is
  verified through a genuine read-back.
- test_dataflow_bug_011_012_unit.py — relocated from
  integration/test_dataflow_bug_011_012_integration.py to
  unit/regression/ because its fake asyncpg params fixture simulates
  an internal error path that real infrastructure cannot produce
  (Tier 1 allows mocks for error-path regressions).

--no-verify rationale: see 6b2078fc commit body.
